description: Animator, constraint solver and model checker for B, Event-B, CSP-M, TLA+, Z
pre_install: Set-Content -LiteralPath "$dir\ProB.vbs" -Encoding ascii -Value @('Set sh = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")','Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")','d = fso.GetParentFolderName(WScript.ScriptFullName)','tclbin = fso.GetAbsolutePathName(d & "\..\..\tcltk\current\bin")','Set env = sh.Environment("Process")','env("SP_TCL_DSO") = tclbin & "\tcl86.dll"','env("SP_TK_DSO") = tclbin & "\tk86.dll"','env("PATH") = tclbin & ";" & env("PATH")','sh.CurrentDirectory = d','sh.Run Chr(34) & d & "\ProBWin.exe" & Chr(34), 0, False')
notes: 'probcli' is the CLI. The Start Menu shortcut runs ProBWin via a small VBScript (wscript) that sets SP_TCL_DSO/SP_TK_DSO from the 'tcltk' dependency and starts the GUI with no console window (ProBWin.exe is a console-subsystem binary), so it works right after install without re-login. Tcl/Tk is provided by the 'tcltk' dependency. Graphviz (suggested) is only needed for -dot graph output.
